rows.notes: Consensus between extractors for clear header.

rows.description: Domus Fund payment on aut of
rows.notes: Consensus on header type and no amounts. Description based on visual verification ('aut' from gemini-flash is correct).
Selected gemini-flash for row_type (total). Pounds and pence are in consensus. Shillings visually verified as '2' (gemini-flash) not '7' (gpt-5-mini).

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's amounts (£0 17s 3 1/2d) and fraction. gemini-flash's description included extraneous '19.3' and missed the s/d amounts. Description from gpt-5-mini as it's cleaner.
Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini's description is cleaner, stopping before the monetary values ('1.1.8') which are extracted into their fields.

gemini-flash correctly identified the dash for zero pounds and the two-digit '18' for shillings. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split '18' into pounds and shillings. Description from gpt-5-mini for cleaner spacing.

gemini-flash's description is correct. Visually, a dash is in pounds column, '13' in shillings, '13' in pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned to pounds/shillings. gemini-flash correctly noted the invalid pence value (13) as an original ledger error, which is extracted as seen on the page.

Visual verification confirms description 'Reading Room' and amounts £0 3s 3d. gemini-flash incorrectly generated an extra row for these amounts and misaligned the following row. gpt-5-mini correctly identified description but mis-categorized amounts into pounds/shillings.

Visual verification confirms description and amounts. gemini-flash correctly identified shillings as '21' and pence as '29' with a dash for pounds, and noted range violations, extracting as seen. gpt-5-mini incorrectly mapped these values to pounds/shillings/pence and misread the description ('Freige').
Consensus on no amounts. Selected gpt-5-mini's row_type as it acts as a header for subsequent indented items. gemini-flash's description is more precise ('& c.').

gemini-flash correctly identified the dash for zero pounds and '25' in the shillings column, noting the range violation. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '25' to pounds. Description from gemini-flash (includes dash and 'aut').

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds and '30' in shillings column. gpt-5-mini's description 'do' is correct. gemini-flash incorrectly read 'do' as 'dr'. gemini-flash correctly identified the shillings value and range violation. Description combined from both.

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds and '30' in shillings column. gpt-5-mini's description 'do' is correct. gemini-flash incorrectly read 'do' as 'dr'. gemini-flash correctly identified the shillings value and range violation. Description combined from both.
gemini-flash correctly identified the amounts as £3 10s 15d and noted the invalid pence range. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged '3' and '10' into '310' pounds. Description from gpt-5-mini ('Salvatici').
Consensus between extractors for clear reading.
Consensus on amounts. gemini-flash's description is more accurate ('Merton' vs gpt-5-mini's 'Menton').
Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini's description is more accurate ('Bottles' vs gemini-flash's 'Ballets').
Consensus on amounts. gemini-flash's description is more accurate to the visual ('do do').

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds and '25' in shillings column. gemini-flash correctly identified the shillings value and range violation. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '25' to pounds. gpt-5-mini's description of 'Warre' is correct.
Consensus between extractors for clear reading.

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '22' in shillings, and '10' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified the shillings value and range violation. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '22' to pounds and '10' to shillings.
Shillings and pence in consensus. Visually verified pounds as '9' (gemini-flash) not '7' (gpt-5-mini).

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '14' in shillings, and '9' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount positions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '14' to pounds and '9' to shillings.

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '18' in shillings, and '3' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount positions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '18' to pounds and '9' to shillings (and misread '3' as '9').
Visual verification confirms amounts £9 13s 2d. gemini-flash correctly identified these values.

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '12' in shillings, and '6' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount positions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '13' to pounds and '2' to shillings (and misread '12' as '13', '6' as '2').

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '10' in shillings, and '3' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount positions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '12' to pounds and '6' to shillings (and misread '10' as '12', '3' as '6').

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '10' in shillings, and '9' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount positions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '10' to pounds and '3' to shillings (and misread '9' as '3').
Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '10' in shillings, and '9' in pence. gemini-flash incorrectly stated no amounts. gpt-5-mini had correct numbers but incorrect column assignment.
Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '1' in shillings, and no pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount position. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '1' to pounds.
Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini's description is more complete ('Commr' vs gemini-flash's 'Comm').

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '20' in shillings, and '11' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified the shillings value and range violation. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '2' to pounds and '0' to shillings, missing the '20'.

Visual verification confirms dash for zero pounds, '5' in shillings, and no pence. gemini-flash correctly identified amount position. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned '5' to pounds. Description combined from both for accuracy.
Consensus on amounts. gemini-flash's reading of 'Caster book' is more accurate to the image than gpt-5-mini's 'auction book'.
Consensus on shillings value and no pounds. gemini-flash's note about no pence visible is accurate to the image (a dash, implying blank, rather than '0').

Visual verification confirms dash for pounds, '9' in shillings, and '16' in pence. gemini-flash correctly identified these values and noted the invalid pence range. gpt-5-mini's amounts and description are incorrect. Description from gemini-flash.
Consensus on amounts. gemini-flash's reading of 'Sust.' is more accurate to the image than gpt-5-mini's 'Invt'.
Consensus between extractors for clear total row.
